playbook.intent: Architect + 2-3 senior engineers walk the week's significant PRs + open RFCs. Goal: spot drift early (cross-service coupling, layering violations, missed reuse), promote good patterns to team patterns.md, queue ADRs.
playbook.scope: Architect + 2-3 senior engineers walk the week's significant PRs + open RFCs. Goal: spot drift early (cross-service coupling, layering violations, missed reuse), promote good patterns to team patterns.md, queue ADRs.

success-criteria.criterion: All 3 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: Triage Topics

tasks.task: Collect RFCs, ADRs, and tech-debt items needing decision
Cut to ≤2 topics for the 45-minute slot

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when the agenda is locked and pre-read is delivered.

stage.name: Run the Review

tasks.task: Each topic gets a presenter and a written proposal
Discuss tradeoffs; reach a decision or schedule follow-up
Capture the decision and the rationale on the spot

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every topic has a written outcome.

stage.name: Publish Decisions
stage.intent: Decisions belong in ADRs, not chat.

tasks.task: Convert every decision into an ADR or RFC update

stage.decision-gate: Required output: every decision lives in an ADR or RFC.
